description: Briefing flagged Specialty Capital fixed-bid proposal to Jerry Pender as overdue and unsent. David confirmed the email was already sent and visible in M365 sent items. Jarvis should have verified sent status via M365 before flagging.
correction: Specialty Capital proposal was sent. Should have checked M365 sent items before surfacing as an open action item.
systemic_fix: Before surfacing a task as overdue/unsent, cross-check M365 sent items when the task involves sending an email or proposal. Do not trust OmniFocus task open status alone for communication-type tasks.
